chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3179 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on M.A. 12731/2022 For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 12229/2022 For hearing of main case 02.11.2022 Mr. Rao Faisal Ali advocate for petitioners. ----- Petitioner No.1 is father of accused Muhammad Asif involved in Crime No.841 of 2022, u/s 489-F PPC,PS Shahra-e-Faisal, District East Karachi, and is seeking inquiry into the same on the ground that his son is innocent. He may approach the trial court for the said purpose. His direct approach to this court is not competent. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
